raw_consumer_statement:
In XX/XX/year>, a weather cancellation of my XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ( {$2300.00} ) controlled exclusively by American Express Travel. On XX/XX/year>, an Amex Travel agent confirmed on a recorded call that replacement travel for my family ( XXXX passengers, XXXX to XXXX ) had been rebooked and payment processed. It had not. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, Amex contacted me about an unresolved issue. I was given XXXX contradictory explanations : my card declined ; only my minor daughter was ticketed ; the fare jumped from {$74.00} to {$920.00} per person ; my card was " restricted or frozen '' ( false never frozen ). An Amex representative acknowledged in writing : " expectations were given differently than how it was supposed to be '' and apologized for " false hopes that may have been given. '' XXXXXXXX XXXX  XXXX was opened. 

Amex then told me in writing I could use provided ticket numbers to rebook directly with XXXX. I spent XXXX hour with XXXX on that basis. XXXX confirmed only Amex could amend those tickets. When I asked Amex directly whether its own instruction was correct, it refused to answer. 

I asked Amex Travel to apply the existing credit to a fresh booking immediately. Refused investigation could take XXXX weeks, credit frozen in the interim. This occurred during spring break. I purchased replacement tickets ( {$2300.00} ), documented my intent in the case record before purchasing, and provided receipts afterward. Amex acknowledged this in writing. 

On XX/XX/year>, Amex called and offered {$90.00} as full resolution. Rejected. 

Total demand : {$4700.00} ( {$2300.00} original value + {$1900.00} replacement airfare + {$430.00} additional charges ).
